title: Hezbollah launches drone toward Israel (Meron area) — no casualties, sirens triggered, first since ceasefire extension
snippet: Hezbollah launched at least one drone toward Israel on Saturday, triggering sirens in the Meron area. No injuries or damage reported. First Hezbollah drone attack since 45-day ceasefire extension was announced. Demonstrates continued mutual escalation despite diplomatic framework.
tag_reason: 휴전 연장 후 첫 헤즈볼라 드론 공격. 신규 사건.
